title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the README.md file to include an author section with relevant details.
details: Open the project's README.md file. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end or in a logical place (e.g., after the project description or before license information). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to a profile (such as GitHub or email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the README.md file in a markdown viewer to confirm the author section appears as intended, is formatted consistently, and contains accurate information. Optionally, have another team member review for clarity and completeness.
